channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 4 Nations Face-Off teams 'jump right in' with little time to spare before the tournament starts
item.description: BROSSARD, Quebec (AP) — The last time Jon Cooper coached an international tournament featuring the NHL's best players, the 2016 World Cup of Hockey came with a training camp and a slate of exhibition games to get ready. The 4 Nations Face-Off has none of that.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods withdraws from his signature event as he processes death of his mother
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Tiger Woods abruptly withdrew from the Genesis Invitational at Torrey Pines on Monday, saying he was still processing the death of his mother. Kultida Woods died unexpectedly last Tuesday at the age of 80.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Simone Biles, Jane Fonda and Brittney Griner headline women’s conference in San Jose
item.description: The one-day annual event will feature keynote speeches and as well as panel discussions and other events related to issues 'connection, motivation, inspiration and skill-building' for women of all ages and at all stages of their careers.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Sabathia to have Yankees logo on Hall of Fame plaque, Wagner the Astros, Suzuki the Mariners
item.description: COOPERSTOWN, N.Y. (AP) — CC Sabathia will have a New York Yankees logo on the cap of his Hall of Fame plaque and Billy Wagner will have the symbol of the Houston Astros. The hall announced the decisions Monday for all five of this year's inductees.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senator opens inquiry into US Center for SafeSport’s hiring of investigator charged with sex crimes
item.description: The chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee is looking into how a former police officer landed an investigator's job at the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 2 Notre Dame women have best ranking in 6 years behind UCLA, South Carolina drops to 4th
item.description: Notre Dame moved up to No. 2 in The Associated Press women's basketball Top 25 on Monday for the Irish's best ranking since 2019. The Fighting Irish replaced South Carolina in the second spot behind UCLA after the Gamecocks lost 66-62 to Texas over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-MLB player Jacque Jones has high school jersey retired
item.description: Jacque Jones, a former Major League Baseball outfielder and San Diego native, had his legacy cemented in his alma mater's history on Saturday with the official retirement of his jersey number.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Brewers unveil patch they will wear on their uniforms to honor Bob Uecker
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Milwaukee Brewers have unveiled a patch they will wear on their uniform this season to honor longtime broadcaster Bob Uecker, who died last month. The patch will appear on the sleeve of the Brewers’ uniforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Member of Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show won't face charges for flag protest
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The cast member who displayed the Palestinian flag with the word “GAZA” in protest during Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show will not face charges, New Orleans police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl losers get this ring instead
item.description: What about the losers? They also get a ring – though not one to commemorate their presence at the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Shiffrin says she's dealing with PTSD after crash and won't defend giant slalom title at ski worlds
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin says she is dealing with post-traumatic stress disorder following a crash in November and will not defend her gold medal in giant slalom at the Alpine skiing world championships.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taylor Swift booed by heavily pro-Eagles crowd at the Super Bowl
item.description: Taylor Swift was back at the Super Bowl to watch Travis Kelce and his Kansas City Chiefs play the Philadelphia Eagles on Sunday. Her reception was a whole lot different than last year.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Eagles beat Chiefs 40-22 in lopsided Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs wanted to make history with three back-to-back-to-back championships, but Super Bowl LIX was dominated by the Philadelphia Eagles, who won the game 40-22.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Even NFL referees get jersey numbers
item.description: You likely aren't looking for the jersey of your favorite NFL referee — so why do they have jersey numbers?
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Trump picks Chiefs for Super Bowl win, praising Mahomes
item.description: “I guess, you have to say that when a quarterback wins as much as he’s won, I have to go with Kansas City,” Trump told Fox News’s Bret Baier.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Canada beats US 3-1 in Game 5 to win the Rivalry Series women's hockey showcase
item.description: Jennifer Gardiner broke a tie with 6:44 left and Canada beat the United States 3-1 on Saturday night to win the Rivalry Series women's hockey showcase for the third straight time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: He's back, baby! ESPN's Dick Vitale makes return to commentating following 4th bout with cancer
item.description: ESPN’s Dick Vitale received a standing ovation Saturday night at Clemson’s Littlejohn Coliseum in his first game back as a commentator since recovering from his fourth bout with cancer.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes offense struggles again in loss to West Virginia
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah basketball team shot just 41 percent from the field and lost its third straight road game at West Virginia Saturday, 72-61.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Longtime NFL player and coach Dick Jauron dies at 74
item.description: The well-liked Jauron moved into coaching and five years later was hired by the Bills as a defensive backs coach.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Vucevic and the Bulls take on Curry and the Warriors
item.description: Golden State Warriors (25-25, 11th in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (22-30, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Bulls host the Golden State Warriors in out-of-conference play on Saturday. The Bulls are 10-16 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into matchup with the Predators
item.description: Nashville Predators (18-27-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (16-31-6, in the Central Division) Chicago; Friday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks play the Nashville Predators after losing three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz acquire guard KJ Martin at trade deadline
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a busy trade deadline for the Utah Jazz, but when all the dust settled, the Jazz are coming away with one new player and five draft picks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jimmy Butler headed to Golden State, Andrew Wiggins to Miami, AP source says
item.description: Jimmy Butler got what he wanted. He's being traded out of Miami and got a new contract in the process. The Heat and the Golden State Warriors have agreed on a deal that sends Butler to the Bay Area, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors to trade for Miami's Jimmy Butler: ESPN
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are finalizing a blockbuster trade for Miami Heat star Jimmy Butler, ESPN reported Wednesday. Butler, 35, also agreed to an extension with the Warriors that will keep him with the team through the 2026-27 season, ESPN said.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Local football player overcomes hardships, signs to play Division I football
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — Mental toughness isn't something you're born with; it's a learned skill. One that Calvary Christian senior Nelson Sparrow Jr. has already mastered. "It feels great," he said. "I dreamt of this. I worked hard for this every single day of my life.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cooper Kupp says the Rams intend to trade him. He's disappointed to end his 8 years with the team
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Receiver Cooper Kupp says the Los Angeles Rams are attempting to trade him after eight seasons with the club, and he doesn't like the decision.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Report: Bears GM Ryan Poles expected to receive 3-year contract extension, according to team source
item.description: The Bears are expected to extend general manager Ryan Poles' contract for three more years, in order to align it with the contract signed by new head coach Ben Johnson, according to a feature story this week by ESPN Bears reporter Courtney Cronin. Cronin published a feature story Monday at ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
